notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielder's choice. Trent Grisham scores. Aaron Judge to 3rd. Cody Bellinger to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielder's choice. Trent Grisham scores. Aaron Judge to 3rd. Cody Bellinger to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Braden Shewmake pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braden Shewmake homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.

notableEvents.label: Christian Vázquez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Vázquez singles on a line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge.

notableEvents.label: Braden Shewmake pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braden Shewmake flies out to shortstop José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Christian Vázquez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Christian Vázquez pops out softly to first baseman Ben Rice in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielder's choice. Trent Grisham scores. Aaron Judge to 3rd. Cody Bellinger to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Jose Altuve.

notableEvents.label: Giancarlo Stanton GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Giancarlo Stanton grounds into a double play, pitcher Lance McCullers Jr. to catcher Yainer Diaz to first baseman Christian Walker. Aaron Judge out at home. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Ben Rice to 2nd. Giancarlo Stanton out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Giancarlo Stanton rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Giancarlo Stanton grounds into a double play, pitcher Lance McCullers Jr. to catcher Yainer Diaz to first baseman Christian Walker. Aaron Judge out at home. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Ben Rice to 2nd. Giancarlo Stanton out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cody Bellinger GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Cody Bellinger out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Astros challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Ryan McMahon grounds into a double play, pitcher Colton Gordon to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores. J.C. Escarra out at 2nd. Ryan McMahon out at 1st.
